column1:
Source	AccessType	ReuseTerms	License	Notes
AIID	public	data export for research	CC0-1.0	Allows citation, requires attribution
OECD AI Incident Repository	public	data use for academic research	OECD Open Data License	Non-commercial, attribution required
AVID (AI Vulnerability Information Database)	public	vulnerability data sharing	Apache 2.0	Attribution, modifications noted
CSET AI Harm Repository	public	open data set	CC BY 4.0	Attribution required
MIT AI Risk Repository	public	open data set	MIT License	Attribute MIT, allowed for academic
MITRE ATLAS (AI Attacks and Threat Landscape)	public	open data set	MITRE Attribution Agreement	Free for research with citation
